cards.front: What is the primary function of the Kernel in an Operating System
cards.back: To manage and control the hardware resources of the system and provide a platform for running applications

cards.front: What is the layer that provides a interface between the hardware and user level applications
What is the layer that provides interface between user level applications and the operating system
What is the layer that provides interface between the user level applications and the hardware
What does the Boot Loader do in an Operating System
cards.back: It loads the operating system into memory and transfers control to the kernel
